ref_contract_no.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as memname, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate , sc_lon_m_contract.member_group_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) as member_group_name, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) /*WHERE*/ --and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'ส00000006364' ) )

r_krabi_app_pay_norm_nest_norm_1.sql: SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.seq_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id, sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.sort_order FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = 'ส00000006364' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ORDER BY sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.sort_order ASC, sc_com_m_receipt_item.description ASC

r_krabi_app_pay_norm_nest_norm_2.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id, ( case trim( money_type_id ) when 'TRD' then pka_com_function.fp_form_depno( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no ) when 'TRB' then pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no , 'XXX-X-XXXXX-X' ) end ) as c_type_name, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.paid_amount, to_snumber((sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.paid_amount)::bigint) as snu_paid_amount, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.sort_order FROM sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ) /*WHERE*/ --and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = 'ส00000006364' ) ) ORDER BY sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.sort_order ASC, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no ASC
